sections.title: Talking without the Cormorant's glove equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: What brings you to these parts, stranger?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What is this place?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: I suppose it is a little different to the places your type are used to...

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: This is my humble little hideaway! Plenty of fish around to sustain a man like me, with the help of my trusty cormorant.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A bird helps you to fish?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Sure she does! I haven't used a rod in years, just send her out to the waters and she takes care of it for me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a go with your bird?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: These birds can be a lot of work... I'm not sure you could handle them, let alone to catch a fish!

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: I don't know, I doubt that your type's up to the task...

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: But it would be quite the amusing sight. Go on!

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: I'll keep an eye on you and make sure you don't have too much trouble with her!

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: You're going to need to free up your hands first, though. Nothing in or on your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't think that's for me... I'll leave that to you.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: No surprises there! Your type never have been cut out for it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a go with your bird?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: I don't know, I doubt that your type's up to the task...

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: But it would be quite the amusing sight. Go on!

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: You're going to need to free up your hands first, though. Nothing in or on your hands.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What's in the sack?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Oh, this? This is my trusty old fish sack!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fish sack?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Yeah, fish sack! I might sell you one if you've found any of those pearls around here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I found this big fish...

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Now that is a biggun! How she managed to wrangle one like that I'll never know.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: If you don't want it, I could take it off your hands for a few of those pearls!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm interested... How many pearls are we talking?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: I'll give you a hundred pearls for it. What do you say?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: On seconds thoughts, I'd rather keep it.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: As you wish.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a deal.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Pleasure doing business with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Well, let me know if you change your mind.

sections.title: Talking with the Cormorant's glove equipped

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Ah, it's you. How are you finding things?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It certainly is a challenge...

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Yes, your type do often seem to underestimate it! Are you finished?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not yet. I think I'll keep trying.

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: Just come back and let me know when you get tired!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll try again another time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have a go with your bird?

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: These birds can be a lot of work... I'm not sure you could handle them, let alone to catch a fish!

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: I don't know, I doubt that your type's up to the task...

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: But it would be quite the amusing sight. Go on!

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: I'll keep an eye on you and make sure you don't have too much trouble with her!

lines.speaker: Alry the Angler
lines.text: You're going to need to free up your hands first, though. Nothing in or on your hands.
